NewStudent.Body: A new student has been added

NewSenior.Body: A new senior has been added

JobRescheduled.Body: Session on {0} at {1} moved to {2} at {3}

PasswordReset.Subject: Password Reset Code
PasswordReset.Body: Your Helpi password reset code is {0}. It expires in 10 minutes.

Invoice.Subject: Booking Confirmation & Invoice
Invoice.Body:
Your booking is confirmed!

Thank you for choosing our service. To secure your appointment and ensure the student's arrival, payment is processed automatically 30 minutes before the scheduled start. Please find your invoice attached.



We look forward to seeing you soon!

ContractAboutToExpire.Subject: Your Contract Will Expire Soon
ContractAboutToExpire.Body:
Hello {0},

Your current contract will expire in {1} days. Please upload a new contract before it expires so your account remains active.

ContractExpired.Subject: Your Contract Has Expired
ContractExpired.Body:
Hello {0},

Your contract expired on {1}. Your account is now marked as expired. Please upload a new contract to reactivate your account.

FinalAccountDeletionWarning.Subject: Final Warning – Your Account Will Be Deleted in 7 Days
FinalAccountDeletionWarning.Body:
Hello {0},

Your contract expired on {1}.

Your account is scheduled for permanent deletion in {2} days.

If you upload a new valid contract before then, your account will be restored automatically.

If no action is taken, your account will be permanently removed from our system.

Thank you.

ContractRenewalReminder.Subject: Reminder: Renew Your Contract
ContractRenewalReminder.Body:
Hello {0},

This is a reminder that your contract will expire soon. Please upload a new contract to avoid any interruption to your account.

AccountSoftDeleted.Subject: Your Account Has Been Deactivated
AccountSoftDeleted.Body:
Hello {0},

Your account has been deactivated because your contract expired over 90 days ago. You can still restore your account by uploading a new contract within the next 90 days.

AccountPermanentlyDeleted.Subject: Your Account Has Been Deleted
AccountPermanentlyDeleted.Body:
Hello {0},

Your account has been permanently deleted because your contract remained expired for more than 180 days.

If you need assistance, please contact Helpi support.
